notableEvents.label: Seiya Suzuki grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki hits a grand slam (10) to left field. Pete Crow-Armstrong scores. Michael Busch scores. Ian Happ scores.

notableEvents.label: Moisés Ballesteros GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Moisés Ballesteros grounds into a double play, pitcher Blas Castaño to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Nico Hoerner out at 2nd. Moisés Ballesteros out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Cole Carrigg batting, Troy Johnston picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, shortstop Dansby Swanson.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Karros pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Karros flies out to right fielder Seiya Suzuki.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Karros pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Karros pops out to second baseman Nico Hoerner.
